scripts.patch-push: bun -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const p='package.json'; const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); const v=pkg.version.split('.').map(Number); v[2]+=1; pkg.version=v.join('.'); fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2)+'\n')" && git add package.json bun.lock && git commit -m 'Patch update' && git push --set-upstream origin $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)
scripts.minor-push: bun -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const p='package.json'; const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); const v=pkg.version.split('.').map(Number); v[1]+=1; v[2]=0; pkg.version=v.join('.'); fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2)+'\n')" && git add package.json bun.lock && git commit -m 'Minor update' && git push --set-upstream origin $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)
scripts.major-push: bun -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const p='package.json'; const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); const v=pkg.version.split('.').map(Number); v[0]+=1; v[1]=0; v[2]=0; pkg.version=v.join('.'); fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2)+'\n')" && git add package.json bun.lock && git commit -m 'Major update' && git push --set-upstream origin $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)
scripts.deploy: bun run build && echo 'app built' && ./deploy.sh && echo 'app deployed to github pages'
